nodes.itemHTML: • .NET in Action - An introduction to implementing full-featured, cross-platform professional applications on the Microsoft .NET platform. [$]
• .NET Maui in Action - A book about creating mobile and desktop apps using a common set of .NET tools. [$]
• ASP.NET Core in Action - Build professional-grade full-stack web applications using C# and ASP.NET Core. [$]
• ASP.NET Core Security - A practical and hands-on guide to securing web applications built with ASP.NET. [$]
• Blazor in Action - A guide to building UIs and client-side applications using C# and .NET. [$]
• C# in Depth - deep dive into the details of the C# language. [$]
• CLR via C# - Dig deep and master the intricacies of the common language runtime, C#, and .NET development. [$]
• Code Like a Pro in C# - Build on your existing programming skills and upskill to professional-level C# programming. [$]
• Dependency Injection in .NET - teaches you to use Dependency Injection to reduce hard-coded dependencies between application components in .NET. [$]
• Entity Framework Core in Action - teaches how to use Entity Framework Core, including lighter weight data access alternatives such as Dapper. [$]
• Functional Programming in C# - Real world examples and practical techniques for functional programming in C# without the jargon and theory. [$]
• Microservices in .NET Core - A comprehensive guide to building microservice systems using the .NET stack. [$]
• Pro .NET 5 Custom Libraries - Consists of sample projects for each data type implementation. Demonstrates implementation in C#. Covers dos and don'ts of each implementation. [$]

• Pro .NET Memory Management - Takes a deep dive into .NET memory management, including comprehensive coverage of how .NET memory works, implementation details, possible pitfalls, and ways to work around them. [$]
• Building Web APIs with ASP.NET Core - Practical beginner’s guide to creating your first web APIs using ASP.NET Core. [$]
